Package: fmt
Repository: https://github.com/fmtlib/fmt.git
Checked on: 2026-03-24 UTC
Checked-out commit: dc05bee30755

Current public vulnerability status:
- One published GitHub advisory was visible on the fmt security page as of 2026-03-24.
- Advisory: GHSA-65g5-63wg-xjh4
- Title: Command injection in fmt::say() on macOS
- Published: 2025-11-16
- Severity: Low

Notes:
- I did not validate exploitability against commit dc05bee30755. This file records public advisory state for the checked-out package.

Sources:
- https://github.com/fmtlib/fmt/security
